implementation_constraints: Preserve permanent IDs in code, commits, tests, and telemetry.
Do not implement blocked or unapproved semantics.
Implementation must attach repository, test, deployment, and runtime evidence.
acceptance_gate: All blockers resolved by accountable owners.
Build Pack and paired QA Pack approved.
No open Critical or High governance exception.
